title: Fan Service
wikitext:
[]: Fan Service Post by Coded to the Core » Thu May 17, 2007 2:52 am Hey Yo , So The New Rebuild movie is comming soon, As you know the First Eva series had some fan service (if you want to call that way) But what 'bout the movies ? Well there be Nakes Rei's - Awkward Shinji - Rei Touching boobs Moments , Jerk off fantasies , Asuka Naked moments , Misato x Kaji scene . What would YOU like to see in the movies , .. More Rei ? More Asuka ? More What ..

[]: Post by Jobhug » Thu May 17, 2007 4:35 am Massive action sequences count as fan service right? Well those then. Too old for the pilots so moar Misato/Ritsuko/Ibuki would be cool.

[]: Post by Big Panda » Thu May 17, 2007 12:15 pm There's been a lot of " YOU " topics lately amirite? Well, the only thing that matters is "NO TIFFANY" Mannn... that dub was really off-character (In a matter of that feeling you feel. Her Asuka was a bitchy cheerleader. Thanks god I watched the sub first!)

[]: Post by Reichu » Thu May 17, 2007 2:00 pm http://evageeks.org/forum/viewtopic.php?t=1985
